name: Cheesy Chicken & Veggie Rice Bowl
description: Seasoned chicken breast with sautéed vegetables and rice, topped with melted cheddar. A satisfying and balanced lunch bowl.
steps: Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, paprika, cayenne, and garlic powder.
Cook chicken in olive oil over medium-high heat, about 6–7 minutes per side, until cooked through. Slice or dice.
In the same pan, sauté diced red onion and minced garlic for 2 minutes.
Add sliced zucchini, mushrooms, and bell pepper. Cook 5–6 minutes until tender.
Stir in the cooked rice and mix everything together.
Top with shredded cheddar and let it melt. Divide into 3 meal prep containers with the chicken.
notes: Store in fridge up to 4 days. Reheat in microwave for 2-3 minutes.
